backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the incident management backend with CRUD operations (createIncident, addUpdate, changeStatus, deleteIncident) stored in an in-memory map, using typed Severity and Status variants.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light (:root) and dark (.dark) themes, including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a #root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with Dashboard and AdminPanel routes, wrapped in ThemeProvider (next-themes) and QueryClientProvider with retry logic.
frontend/src/components/AddUpdateForm.ts: React Hook Form-based form for appending a timestamped update message to a selected incident, showing current status context and calling the useAddUpdate mutation on submit.
frontend/src/components/ChangeStatusForm: Form component for changing an incident's status, featuring incident and new-status dropdowns with color-coded status indicators and displaying the current status before submission.
frontend/src/components/CreateIncidentFo: A React form component for creating new incidents, using react-hook-form for validation, checking for duplicate IDs, and submitting via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/IncidentCard.tsx: Displays a single incident as a collapsible card showing severity, status, affected service, timestamps, description, and a sorted list of updates.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with navigation links, theme toggle, logout button, main content slot, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/SeverityBadge.ts: Renders a styled badge for incident severity levels (critical, major, minor, informational) with color-coded dot indicators.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a styled badge for incident status values (investigating, identified, monitoring, resolved) with distinct color schemes.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between dark and light themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a sun or moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all incident-related backend operations: fetching all incidents, creating, updating, changing status, deleting, and checking ID uniqueness.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Wraps next-themes to expose the current resolved theme, a dark mode boolean, and a toggle function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark color tokens including status and severity colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin page gated by Internet Identity authentication, providing tabbed forms to create incidents, add updates, change status, and delete resolved incidents.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Public dashboard page that displays all incidents with search and status filtering, separating active from resolved incidents and handling loading/error states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based CSS variable color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, shadows, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 17) for an internal IT status page dashboard, including architectural notes, known issues (backend connection failures, stale incident display), and a list of existing features with their IDs and requirement references.
